nodes.title: Short title and commencement
nodes.summary: This section provides the short title of the Act and its commencement details.

nodes.title: Definitions
nodes.summary: This section defines key terms used throughout the Act.

nodes.title: Application of Act
nodes.summary: This section outlines the territorial and personal scope of the Act.

nodes.title: Grounds for processing personal data
nodes.summary: This section specifies the lawful grounds for processing personal data.

nodes.title: Notice
nodes.summary: This section mandates the provision of notice to data principals before processing their data.

nodes.title: Consent
nodes.summary: This section details the requirements for obtaining valid consent from data principals.

nodes.title: Certain legitimate uses
nodes.summary: This section lists specific legitimate uses for processing personal data without consent.

nodes.title: General obligations of Data Fiduciary
nodes.summary: This section outlines the general responsibilities of data fiduciaries in handling personal data.

nodes.title: Processing of personal data of children
nodes.summary: This section provides special provisions for processing children's personal data.

nodes.title: Additional obligations of Significant Data Fiduciary
nodes.summary: This section imposes additional obligations on significant data fiduciaries.

nodes.title: Right to access information about personal data
nodes.summary: This section grants data principals the right to access information about their personal data.

nodes.title: Right to correction and erasure of personal data
nodes.summary: This section provides data principals the right to correct and erase their personal data.

nodes.title: Right of grievance redressal
nodes.summary: This section ensures data principals have access to grievance redressal mechanisms.

nodes.title: Right to nominate
nodes.summary: This section allows data principals to nominate others to exercise their rights posthumously or in case of incapacity.

nodes.title: Duties of Data Principal
nodes.summary: This section outlines the duties of data principals under the Act.

nodes.title: Processing of personal data outside India
nodes.summary: This section regulates the transfer of personal data outside India.

nodes.title: Exemptions
nodes.summary: This section lists exemptions to the application of the Act.

nodes.title: Establishment of Board
nodes.summary: This section establishes the Data Protection Board of India.

nodes.title: Composition and qualifications for appointment of Chairperson and Members
nodes.summary: This section details the composition and qualifications for the Board's Chairperson and Members.

nodes.title: Salary, allowances payable to and term of office
nodes.summary: This section specifies the salary, allowances, and term of office for the Board's Chairperson and Members.

nodes.title: Disqualifications for appointment and continuation as Chairperson and Members of Board
nodes.summary: Lists the disqualifications for being appointed or continuing as the Chairperson or a Member of the Board.

nodes.title: Resignation by Members and filling of vacancy
nodes.summary: Describes the process for resignation of Board members and filling vacancies.

nodes.title: Proceedings of Board
nodes.summary: Outlines the procedures for Board meetings and decision-making.

nodes.title: Officers and employees of Board
nodes.summary: Allows the Board to appoint officers and employees with the Central Government's approval.

nodes.title: Members and officers to be public servants
nodes.summary: Declares Board members and officers as public servants under the Indian Penal Code.

nodes.title: Powers of Chairperson
nodes.summary: Details the powers of the Chairperson regarding administrative matters of the Board.

nodes.title: POWERS, FUNCTIONS AND PROCEDURE TO BE FOLLOWED BY BOARD
nodes.summary: Describes the powers, functions, and procedures of the Board.

nodes.title: Powers and functions of Board
nodes.summary: Lists the powers and functions of the Board, including handling data breaches and complaints.

nodes.title: Procedure to be followed by Board
nodes.summary: Outlines the procedure for the Board's inquiries and decision-making process.

nodes.title: APPEAL AND ALTERNATE DISPUTE RESOLUTION
nodes.summary: Covers the appeal process and alternate dispute resolution mechanisms.

nodes.title: Appeal to Appellate Tribunal
nodes.summary: Describes the process for appealing Board decisions to the Appellate Tribunal.

nodes.title: Orders passed by Appellate Tribunal to be executable as decree
nodes.summary: States that Appellate Tribunal orders are executable as civil court decrees.

nodes.title: Alternate dispute resolution
nodes.summary: Allows for mediation as a means to resolve disputes.

nodes.title: Voluntary undertaking
nodes.summary: Permits the Board to accept voluntary undertakings related to compliance.

nodes.title: PENALTIES AND ADJUDICATION
nodes.summary: Details penalties for breaches and the adjudication process.

nodes.title: Penalties
nodes.summary: Specifies monetary penalties for significant breaches of the Act.

nodes.title: Crediting sums realised by way of penalties to Consolidated Fund of India
nodes.summary: Mandates that penalties collected are credited to the Consolidated Fund of India.

nodes.title: MISCELLANEOUS
nodes.summary: Includes various provisions such as protection of actions, power to make rules, and amendments.

nodes.title: Protection of action taken in good faith
nodes.summary: Protects actions taken in good faith under the Act from legal proceedings.

nodes.title: Power to call for information
nodes.summary: Allows the Central Government to request information from the Board and Data Fiduciaries.

nodes.title: Power of Central Government to issue directions
nodes.summary: Empowers the Central Government to issue directions for blocking information in public interest.

nodes.title: Consistency with other laws
nodes.summary: States that the Act is in addition to other laws and prevails in case of conflict.

nodes.title: Bar of jurisdiction
nodes.summary: Precludes civil courts from jurisdiction over matters under the Act.

nodes.title: Power to make rules
nodes.summary: Grants the Central Government the power to make rules for carrying out the Act.

nodes.title: Laying of rules and certain notifications
nodes.summary: Requires rules and notifications to be laid before Parliament.

nodes.title: Power to amend Schedule
nodes.summary: Allows the Central Government to amend the Schedule of penalties.

nodes.title: Power to remove difficulties
nodes.summary: Empowers the Central Government to make provisions for removing difficulties in implementing the Act.

nodes.title: Amendments to certain Acts
nodes.summary: Details amendments to other Acts as a consequence of this Act.
